incorrects.description: Student selected 3, counting symbols instead of reading the scale

steps.text: You counted symbols. Bar graphs don't use symbols. Find where the Museum bar ends on the scale at the bottom.

incorrects.description: Student selected 25, estimating between 20 and 30 but choosing wrong midpoint

params.description: Museum bar highlights with axis line at 30.

steps.text: The Museum bar ends exactly at a line on the scale. Which number is right where the bar ends?

incorrects.description: Student selected 35, reading one interval too high

params.description: Museum bar highlights with guideline to axis.

steps.text: Look closely at where the Museum bar ends. It's not at 35. Find the line where the bar stops.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Horizontal line draws from end of Museum bar down to axis at 30.

steps.text: Let me show you. I draw a line from the end of the Museum bar straight down to the scale. It lands right at the 30 line. The Museum bar shows 30 votes.
